name: learn-java-frameworks-marketplace
description: Analyze any source project (Python, Go, Rust, Node.js, C#, Ruby, Java, etc.) and build simplified Java reimplementations with progressive code-first tutorials, Mermaid diagrams, and Insight blocks — three learning approaches: API-first (outside-in), core-first (inside-out), and enterprise re-implementation

plugins.name: api-learning
plugins.description: Analyze any source project outside-in from the API surface and build simplified Java reimplementations with vertical slice tutorials, Mermaid call-chain diagrams, and Insight blocks

plugins.name: core-learning
plugins.description: Analyze any source project inside-out from the internal core and build simplified Java reimplementations with progressive tutorials, Mermaid architecture diagrams, and Insight blocks

plugins.name: enterprise-learning
plugins.description: Re-implement any source project (any language) into enterprise-grade Java with Spring Boot 4 or plain Java 21+, rich 10-section tutorials, Mermaid visualizations, and Insight blocks
